sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21805" key="geloi/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γελοίων</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γελοίωντες</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γελόω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γελόωντες</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sub <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γελάω</foreign>.</entryFree>
